rules.notes: Strong key from 45-degree angle, minimal fill. Creates triangle of light on shadow side of face.
Extreme contrast between light and shadow. strong directional source, minimal ambient.
Strong backlight, no front wash. Subjects appear as dark shapes against bright background.
Tight spot on performer, ambient at 10-20%. Draws focus to single performer.

source: Francis Reid - The Stage Lighting Handbook

rules.notes: Two complementary color washes blended. warm from one side, cool from other.

source: Shelley - A Practical Guide to Stage Lighting

rules.notes: Lighting motivated by on-stage sources: candles, lamps, fireplaces. Realistic, not theatrical.

source: Francis Reid - The Stage Lighting Handbook
